title: EU to legislate about Chat Control behind closed doors
author: NeutralForest
aiHeadline: EU secretly planning to control your chats while you're not looking, because what you don't know can't hurt you—or your privacy.

title: GLM 5.2 beats Claude in our benchmarks
author: jms703

title: I used Claude Code to get a second opinion on my MRI
author: engmarketer
aiHeadline: AI gives medical advice cheaper than your doctor, but don't let it operate on you—unless you're feeling adventurous.

title: The KIDS Act would require age checks to get online
author: bilsbie
aiHeadline: New law aims to keep kids safe online by making everyone prove their age, which will work great until someone figures out how to fake it.

title: Flock cameras track more than your license plate, and they're spreading fast
author: SanjayMehta
aiHeadline: Cameras track everything, and they're everywhere now—so much for privacy, right?
